overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring wet reflective streets, towering neon-lit skyscrapers, and heavy atmospheric haze. The character walks along sidewalks and crosses beneath an elevated highway overpass adorned with digital billboards. Light rain falls throughout the scene, creating reflective surfaces on the pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet city sidewalk alongside multi-lane road with neon-lit buildings

events.description: light rain begins to fall, visible as streaks in the air and increasing wetness on pavement

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet tiled sidewalk, passing streetlights and illuminated building facades

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: tall futuristic towers with glowing red and blue neon signage
long concrete wall with continuous horizontal yellow neon strip lighting
tall black street lamp with bright white overhead light
orange-brown tiled sidewalk with rain reflections and puddles

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night in a futuristic city, walking along a wet orange-tiled sidewalk. To the left, towering buildings display vibrant neon signage, while a long wall with yellow neon strip lighting runs along the right. Light rain begins to fall around the 12-second mark, creating reflective surfaces on the pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: open intersection approach with distant illuminated skyscrapers

events.description: pedestrian ahead stops walking and stands stationary near a streetlight pole

agents.ego_description: continuing straight toward the intersection, approaching the stationary pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: person standing still near a streetlight pole at the intersection approach

entered.detail: overhead directional road sign with 'HEYWOOD' text visible against the dark sky
wide road intersection with visible crosswalk markings and traffic signals

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the rain-soaked streets, the camera approaches a major intersection marked by a 'HEYWOOD' overhead sign. The pedestrian ahead has stopped near a streetlight pole. The yellow neon wall falls behind as the scene opens up to reveal the wide intersection and distant skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection beneath elevated highway with dense digital billboards

events.description: turns right at the intersection, stepping off the sidewalk onto the crosswalk
enters the area beneath the elevated highway overpass with hanging digital displays

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection and walking across the wet street beneath the overpass

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving past on the wet road, headlights reflecting on the pavement

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure overhead with thick support pillars and metal framework
multiple large hanging digital advertisement screens displaying colorful graphics under the overpass
marked pedestrian crossing with textured traction strips on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character turns right at the intersection, crossing the street beneath a massive elevated highway overpass. The environment becomes semi-covered as digital billboards line the left side overhead. A black car passes by on the wet road while the camera continues walking under the concrete structure, with the HEYWOOD sign now directly overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rainy cyberpunk district that transitions from a narrow neon-lit corridor into a wide urban intersection and finally beneath a massive concrete overpass. It begins by walking along a wet orange-tiled sidewalk, flanked by towering buildings with vibrant signage on the left and a long wall of yellow neon strips on the right. As light rain begins to fall and create reflective surfaces on the pavement, the yellow wall recedes and the view opens up toward a major intersection marked by a Heywood overhead sign. The camera then turns right to cross the rain-soaked street, shifting from the open city air to a semi-covered environment beneath a heavy highway overpass. Finally, the scene moves past a passing black car and under the concrete structure, with digital billboards lining the overhead view as the Heywood sign passes directly above.
